business.name: Apex Refrigerator Repair LLC
business.tagline: When your fridge quits, we show up

hero.headline: *Nate* answers the phone — not a call center
hero.subheadline: Your KitchenAid's making weird noises? We'll have the part and the fix in 4 days max.

services_section.label: THE FIX
services_section.heading: Every brand, every problem
services_section.subheading: From ice makers to compressors — we stock the parts that matter

services.title: Ice Maker Repair
services.description: Motor replacements, water line fixes, and getting those cubes flowing again.

services.title: Compressor Service
services.description: When it's not cooling right, we diagnose the real problem — not just guess.

services.title: Door Seal Replacement
services.description: Stop the cold air leaks and cut your electric bill.

services.title: Temperature Control Issues
services.description: Freezer too cold, fridge too warm? We'll balance it out.

services.title: Water Dispenser Repair
services.description: Get that filtered water flowing without the drips and leaks.

about.heading: One guy, one truck, real answers
about.body: We're the Cincinnati appliance team that shows up when we say we will. No call centers, no runaround — just Nate and the right parts to get your fridge working.

reviews.name: Benjamin B.
reviews.text: Nate was awesome — super easy to talk to and made everything painless. Will definitely call him back and always recommend. 10/10.

reviews.name: Lisa L.
reviews.text: Super quick to respond, came out the next day to diagnose, and had the repair done in less than 4 days. Extremely reasonable pricing and great communication.

reviews.name: Kathy C.
reviews.text: Very professional and knowledgeable about KitchenAid refrigerators. Fixed my ice maker motor and rail glides completely. Would definitely recommend.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater Cincinnati
service_areas.subheading: Same-day diagnosis across the metro area

cta.heading: Fridge acting up? We've got the part
cta.body: Call now for same-day diagnosis. Most repairs completed within the week with upfront pricing.
